## Shared Infrastructure

> These resources are cross-project. Check them before building anything new.

**Vault tools:** `C:\Users\YOU\vault\tools\index.md`
  30+ reusable scripts and utilities — check before implementing. Rule: exact match → use it; similar → adapt it; nothing close → build new and register.

**Skills** (Claude Code: `/skill-name`, Codex: `.agents/skills/`):
  agent-ado · agent-communicator · configure-devteam · deep-plan · dev-team · developer-backend · developer-database · developer-frontend · developer-fullstack · documenter · excalidraw-diagram · pattern-analyst · pipeline-gateway · project-manager · psi-wiki · researcher · reviewer-code · security-reviewer · session-reviewer · vault-librarian
  Full index: `C:\Users\YOU\.claude\skills\index.md`

**vaultflow** (hook system + shared DB):
  DB search:  `node C:\GIT\vaultflow\.claude\helpers\db.cjs --search "query"`
  Gen context: `node C:\GIT\vaultflow\.claude\helpers\gen-context.mjs`
  Model status: `node C:\GIT\vaultflow\.claude\helpers\model-router.cjs --status`

**Vault:** `C:\Users\YOU\vault`
  `vault/tools/` — reusable tools  |  `vault/methodology/` — engineering patterns
  `vault/domain/` — domain knowledge  |  `vault/agents/` — agent registry

## Rules
- Read wiki/llms.txt before answering domain questions.
- Check vault tools index before building any utility or script.
- Match existing code patterns — do not introduce new conventions.
- Never commit secrets, connection strings, or .env files.
